exception.message: Unable to find element with locator By.xpath: //input[@name = 'ss'] For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#no-such-element-exception Build info: version: '4.31.0', revision: '1ef9f18787*' System info: os.name: 'Mac OS X', os.arch: 'x86_64', os.version: '15.2', java.version: '17.0.6' Driver info: driver.version: RemoteWebDriver
